body:
- Updates SurfaceFluxes compat to 0.14.1 (which removes neutral stability catches and changes the solver to use fixed point iterations, introduces interface support for iterative solution of aerodynamic roughnesses). `kwarg` separators are used for clarity. 
- Fixes an issue with the snow depth cap (currently, for instance, the `snow + soil` test sees 5m snow depth, whereas the cap is expected to be 10cm) 
- Fixes an issue with the `energy_from_q_l_and_swe` function in the integrated `snow + soil` test case. (Previously this resulted in unphysical temperature, pressure values in the surface state)
title: Update SurfaceFluxes compat (0.14.1)

body:
This PR updates ClimaDiagnostics to v0.3.0 and makes the necessary changes for the breaking release of ClimaDiagnostics. In particular, the dates of any time reductions is now at the start of the period rather than at the end. This means that shifting dates is not necessary for postprocessing.

TODO
- [x] Merge https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaDiagnostics.jl/pull/139
- [x] Update manifests
title: Update ClimaDiagnostics to v0.3.0
path fix
